# Copilot Instructions

## Preparing a PR

Before raising a PR, run the following in order:

1. `cargo test --all` - ensure all tests pass
2. `cargo clippy --all` - fix any lints
3. `cargo fmt` - format the code

## Generated code

Many files in this repository are generated by tools and should not be edited directly. After making changes that affect generated output, regenerate the relevant files by running the appropriate tool from the root of the repository:

- `cargo run -p tool_bindings` - regenerates the Windows API bindings
- `cargo run -p tool_bindgen` - regenerates bindgen test bindings
- `cargo run -p tool_yml` - regenerates GitHub Actions workflow YAML files
- `cargo run -p tool_license` - regenerates license files across crates
- `cargo run -p tool_standalone` - regenerates standalone bindings
- `cargo run -p tool_workspace` - regenerates workspace configuration

## Pull requests

All PRs should reference an existing issue. Use the PR template and fill in the issue number.

## Crate structure

- `crates/libs/` - library crates (`windows`, `windows-core`, `windows-bindgen`, `windows-metadata`, etc.)
- `crates/tools/` - code generation and maintenance tools
- `crates/tests/` - test crates
- `crates/targets/` - target-specific crates
- `crates/samples/` - sample code
